title: Reasoning, Planning, Decomposition, and Verification · Failure Triage
summary: Prompt a difficult migration without exposing or demanding hidden reasoning. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a plan-execute-verify task contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.
Use planning before implementation when scope, dependencies, or user choices are materially uncertain.
Decompose work around independently verifiable outcomes and dependency order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-uncertainty-report-huvkma" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Uncertainty Report into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-uncertainty-report-huvkma
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
